title: MCA § 27-1-101 - Judicial remedies defined
text:
27-1-101. Judicial remedies defined. Judicial remedies are such as are administered by the courts of justice or by judicial officers empowered for the purpose by the constitution and statutes of this state.

History: History: En. Sec. 3469, C. Civ. Proc. 1895; re-en. Sec. 8077, Rev. C. 1907; re-en. Sec. 8995, R.C.M. 1921; Cal. C. Civ. Proc. Sec. 20; re-en. Sec. 8995, R.C.M. 1935; R.C.M. 1947, 93-2201.
mca_title: TITLE 27. CIVIL LIABILITY, REMEDIES, AND LIMITATIONS
